steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The claim states “marks a significant change in Martin's artistic development” — the supporting quote must show what came before Harbor Number 1 and how the work represents a departure from it.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
"The paintings that Martin produced before Harbor Number 1 can be thought of as belonging to her earlier style, to which she never returned." distinguishes an “earlier style” that Martin never returned to, placing Harbor Number 1 at the threshold of a new creative phase.

The other three options focus on interpretation, influence, and artistic value without showing a shift in her development.

That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
